name: wame
description: Claude Code plugins by WAME — developer productivity tools for teams

plugins.name: git-commits
plugins.description: Fetch and summarize git commits across all repositories for a date range. Shows timeline with AI-powered summaries, file changes, and project breakdown. Supports GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket.

plugins.name: laravel-docs
plugins.description: Generate Laravel project specifications (technical, business, admin navigation) for individual models or modules. Auto-detects modular (wamesk/*, Modules/*) vs flat (app/Models) project structure. Configurable output paths, per-project config, and replaceable prompts per documentation type.
